/home/moebius/eclipse/host-toolchains/bin/x86_64-linux-musl-gcc -fPIC -idirafter /home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/usr/include -idirafter /home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/include -idirafter /home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/usr/include -idirafter /home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/include  -fno-strict-aliasing -fvisibility=hidden -L/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/usr/lib -L/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/lib -L/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/usr/lib -L/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/moebius/eclipse/eclipse-os-build/lib -shared -Wl,-soname,libexpat.so.1 -o libexpat.so.1.9.2 CMakeFiles/expat.dir/lib/xmlparse.c.o CMakeFiles/expat.dir/lib/xmlrole.c.o CMakeFiles/expat.dir/lib/xmltok.c.o  -lm
